title: Meta-Analysis Reveals Both the Promises and the Challenges of Clinical Metabolomics.
author: Roth HE Powers R
content: S-EPMC9406125 PMC9406125 Meta-Analysis Reveals Both the Promises and the Challenges of Clinical Metabolomics. Clinical metabolomics is a rapidly expanding field focused on identifying molecular biomarkers to aid in the efficient diagnosis and treatment of human diseases. Variations in study design
